content: The article examines how Iran’s nationwide internet shutdowns affect daily life. Overall, the blackout underscores the tension between state control and society’s demand for digital connectivity.

title: 别把耗时任务都丢进 async：HarmonyOS 里 TaskPool 和 Worker 的边界感
content: HarmonyOS developers should separate heavy CPU work from UI. Short, stateless calculations run in TaskPool; longer, stateful background jobs use Workers. Pass only minimal, plain data to workers, never UI components or complex objects. Use task identifiers and alive checks to avoid stale updates. Chunk large tasks to reduce load, but avoid overly fine-grained splits. Remember to terminate Workers, report progress, and provide error handling. This clear boundary reduces frame drops, race conditions, and memory leaks in mobile apps.

title: 最近刷屏的Flipbook，想把互联网彻底变成实时生成的无限世界 | 原文
content: Flipbook proposes a new web browsing model that transforms the internet into a continuously generated, infinitely extendable image, moving away from static web pages. The concept draws on the idea of AI‑driven, on‑demand content creation, suggesting a future where personalized, real‑time information is reconstructed rather than listed. Rather than navigating through predetermined links, users explore a dynamic visual landscape that expands as needed, reflecting a shift toward immersive, generative online experiences.

title: 追觅携人车家在硅谷举办发布会周，与全球行业泰斗共话人类科技下一个十年，如何看待品牌迎来「中国时刻」？
content: From April 27–30, 2026, the Chiming (追觅) and Human Auto House ecosystem hosted its first “DREAME NEXT” launch week in Silicon Valley. title: 做了个 支持 AI 运维的 SSH 终端 TermCat，最近加了 Claude Code 插件面板，求各位 V 友拍砖
content: TermCat is a cross‑platform SSH terminal that adds AI‑driven operations and a plugin system. It lets users describe a task (e.g., “fix Nginx 502”), and an AI agent plans, runs commands with confirmation, and handles high‑risk actions. A new Claude Code Power plugin displays active sessions, tool usage, and environments, and manages multiple API presets. The app is built with Electron, React, and Go, supporting tabs, split panes, SFTP, and a declarative plugin API that needs minimal React knowledge.

title: 银行信用卡“大减肥”，4年消失1亿张
content: Credit card usage in China has declined sharply, dropping over 100 million cards in four years to below 700 million by the end of 2025. Banks such as ICBC and BC Bank have reduced issuance and reported rising delinquency rates, especially ICBC’s credit card bad debt nearly doubled. Factors include shrinking perks, competition from fintech products, higher costs, and tighter regulatory scrutiny. Consequently, banks are cutting card centers, tightening underwriting, and redirecting focus to high‑value customers.

title: 想知道各位在工作和个人项目中是如何使用 cc 的
content: The post discusses how users employ ChatGPT (CC) in work and personal projects. It notes that current usage is still in early stages. Users describe bugs to the dialogue model, provide error messages, and specify code scopes (API, class, method) for automated analysis and patching, followed by self‑testing. For larger changes or feature requests, they use an openspec workflow: explore with the model, implement, refine through dialogue, test, archive, and submit. Currently they have a MySQL MCP and an openspec.

title: 第一批没结婚的韩国中女，已经开始“领养”闺蜜了
content: Kim Eun-soo, a 40‑year‑old Korean woman, adopted her close female friend, Seong‑mi, during a ten‑year shared rural life. The legal adoption, Korea’s first adult‑to‑friend case, was motivated by mutual security and elderly care concerns. Kim’s memoir, *I Adopted a Friend*, sparked national debate on non‑traditional families and highlighted rising trends of friend‑based households and flexible eldercare arrangements.

The company remains in early development, with unclear commercialization plans.

title: 2026 04 29 HackerNews
content: Google will force Android developers to register, authenticate and pay from September 2026, silencing apps that do not comply. LocalSend offers an open‑source cross‑platform AirDrop alternative, but its need for a shared network and manual setup hampers usability. A color‑recognition test shows that cultural and display factors influence how people perceive shades of blue, green, and cyan. The GNU‑like “Talkie” model imitates 1930s language but often misidentifies facts. GTFOBins lists Unix binaries that can be abused to bypass restrictions. Flo, a menstrual‑tracking app, illegally sold user data to Meta, sparking a privacy lawsuit. Super ZSNES is a GPU‑accelerated SNES emulator with enhanced audio and graphics. GitHub experienced a silent‑failure incident with pull‑request indexing. A student‑letter warns developers to prioritize ethics over speed. The UAE plans to exit OPEC to boost output, reshaping Gulf geopolitics.

title: 细看紫金矿业勘查找矿这看家本领
content: Zijin Mining has dramatically increased its resource base for copper, gold, lithium, silver, and molybdenum, adding over 75% more reserves between 2021 and 2025. The company’s long‑term sustainability is supported by low‑cost, high‑yield exploration, yielding half of its copper and nearly all its lead‑zinc reserves through in‑house prospection. Leveraging advanced geological theories and AI, Zijin has expanded globally, securing projects in 17 countries and winning a Saudi Arabian mining bid, underscoring its enduring exploration expertise.

title: 百度宣布组织升级：「双轨」职业发展体系升级为单一通道
content: Baidu announced a restructuring of its talent and organization management. It will unify the dual career tracks into a single graded system (levels 5–12) effective 1 May 2026 to break barriers and develop multi‑skilled leaders. New hiring criteria emphasize a youthful mindset and first‑principle thinking. The plan also aims to increase agility by eliminating internal borders, reducing reporting layers, and expanding delegation.

title: 《时代》评全球 AI 影响力十强，阿里等中国公司入选
content: Time magazine released its “Top 10 Most Influential AI Companies of 2026” list, ranking firms on industry impact, technology paths, and societal influence. Three Chinese companies—Alibaba, ByteDance, and Zhiyu—orched the list. Alibaba’s open-source AI model Qianwen surpassed 1 billion downloads. ByteDance’s AI assistant Doubao logged over 100 million daily active users during the Lunar New Year and 155 million weekly users. Zhiyu’s GLM‑5 led certain metrics over Gemini 3 Pro and runs on Huawei processors. OpenAI, Alphabet, and others also appeared.

title: DeepSeek 注册资本提高 50%
content: DeepSeek, a Hangzhou-based AI research company, raised its registered capital from 10 million to 15 million yuan. Founder Liang Wenfeng increased his paid‑in capital from 1 million to 5.1 million yuan, boosting his ownership share from 1% to 34%. Reports indicate that the company may pursue its first external funding round, with potential participation from Tencent and Alibaba.

title: 网信部门依法查处「剪映」App 等生成合成内容标识违法问题网站平台
content: The Cybersecurity Administration found that the apps "Jianying" and "MaoXiang," and the website "Jimu AI," do not comply with regulations requiring the labeling of AI-generated synthetic content. This violates applicable laws, so the State Internet Information Office directed local authorities to conduct a formal discussion, order corrections, issue warnings, and enforce strict penalties against responsible parties.

title: 探店网红白冰偷税超 900 万元被查
content: The National Tax Bureau investigated social media influencer Bai Bing for tax evasion. From 2021 to 2024, Bai used income reclassification and false declarations to underpay taxes, totaling 9.1118 million yuan. In October 2025, the bureau imposed a penalty of 18.9124 million yuan, covering unpaid taxes, late fees, and fines. All owed amounts have now been recovered.

It also launched an Agent ecosystem partnership program with several framework vendors. The MiMo‑V2.5‑Pro model was open‑sourced, with compatibility to multiple chip makers and inference frameworks, and entered public testing on April 23. Xiaomi revised its token pricing, released benchmark results for MiMo‑V2.5‑Pro, and highlighted substantial AI research and investment exceeding 16 billion yuan.

content: Ember, an environmental analytics firm, warns that methane emissions from unreported coal mining operations pose a significant threat to global climate mitigation efforts. The firm highlights how missing data on these emissions hampers accurate assessment of coal’s true climate impact, potentially undermining policy decisions and climate targets. Ember’s findings call for greater transparency and tighter regulation of methane reporting in the coal sector to safeguard progress toward emissions reductions.

The move reflects the bank’s precautionary stance on emerging AI tools, aiming to safeguard data security and compliance. No additional details on broader impact are provided.

title: 微信朋友圈改版，文字描述从配图右侧移至上方，并新增时间轴浏览功能，你发现了吗？你喜欢这个新样式吗？
content: WeChat changed its Moments layout on April 28: text that used to appear beside images now sits above them, and the post time format was updated. The top‑right corner now offers a “Moments Album” that lets users scroll by year, month, or day, similar to Apple’s Photos app. Tencent said the change is an optimization to improve browsing. Users reacted with mixed feelings—some liked the new layout, others preferred the old design.

title: 它活了几百年，秘诀只有一个：让老天帮它干掉不长眼的邻居 | 原文
content: In Panama’s tropical rainforest a few species thrive for centuries by exploiting lightning. Researchers found that the Dipteryx oleifera tree, when struck by lightning, often survives while nearby smaller trees are killed—providing a natural competitive advantage. Monitoring on Barro Colorado Island revealed lightning as a major selective force, shaping forest structure and promoting these long‑lived species.

Population decline can reduce overall consumption, but its impact varies by sector and time. For example, over the next decade, the 70‑80 age group will shrink, largely affecting the liquor market while having little effect on cars or gaming. Therefore, demographic shifts must be analyzed by specific industries and generational changes; some sectors may contract, others may find new opportunities.

title: 巴黎主场5比4战胜拜仁，创造欧冠半决赛进球纪录，如何评价本场比赛？
content: Paris Saint‑Germain won 5–4 at home over Bayern Munich in the first leg of the Champions League semi‑final. In the first half, Di Maio earned a penalty for Kylian N\'Pé, who scored; Dembélé missed two one‑on‑ones, supplied a pass and created a penalty, while Quáfartheil and N’Golo Kanté each added a goal, and Ochise found the net. In the second half, Quáfartheil and Dembélé each scored twice, while Pampa‑Cano and Di Maio also added two goals. The match set a new record for goals in a Champions League semi‑final, and the return leg will be played at Bayern’s home on 7 May.

title: 为何DeepSeek的新模型反响平平

Although I iterated through multiple versions and installed a preferred web UI and self‑evolution skill, my 32 GB MacBook Air can only barely run a 4‑bit quantized Qwen3.6‑35B or Gemma4‑26B. I added automatic memory monitoring to throttle inference when usage exceeds 92 %, and used a fan to reduce heat. Despite these tweaks, hardware limits remain the main bottleneck.

title: 霸王茶姬回应顾客喝出水银：高度重视 一切以调查结果为准
content: In July 2024, a woman in Suzhou, Anhui, claimed to find liquid‑metal beads resembling mercury in a drink from a Ba Wang Tea Jí outlet at Dangshan Wanda Plaza. She tasted a gritty texture, then saw silver spheres about 2 mm in diameter at the cup’s bottom. The store tested the particles, noting a metallic shine different from water droplets, and said mercury could not appear in the preparation process. The incident was reported to police and the local market‑supervision authority; the store is cooperating with the ongoing investigation.

title: OpenAI 未达成营收目标，甲骨文及多只芯片股应声下跌
content: OpenAI missed its revenue target, sparking doubts about the sustainability of high AI‑industry spending. This caused a sharp sell‑off in AI infrastructure stocks: Oracle fell about 7.5%, Nvidia and other chipmakers dropped 2%–5%, CoreWeave fell 7%, and SoftBank sagged around 10%. Analysts worry that lower revenue could jeopardise OpenAI’s future cloud‑computing contracts, further eroding confidence in the sector.
